## SiO² infused PPF maintenance
Q²M PPF Renew is the world’s first SiO² infused paint protection film maintenance product. Containing silica, not only does it restore gloss and slickness, it also does provide great UV protection and chemical resistance. It is also a very good base prior to a ceramic coating of your choice.
Even high quality, self-healing paint protection film becomes contaminated, dull and changes its initial smoothness over time. Gyeon Q²M PPF Renew brings a remedy to that. With its light abbrasive properties, it is able to dramatically improve the level of gloss. The cleaning action of the product allows the removal of bonded contamination deep in the porous structure, restoring the initial slickness and smooth feel of the film.

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ppf-renew-square-pic.webp?v=1737223857&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ppf-renew-vertical-pic.webp?v=1737223857&width=1080)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ppf-renew.webp?v=1737223934&width=2400)

PPF Defect Remover + UV Protection
Maintaining paint protection film has never been that easy. Q²M PPF Renew combines light abrasive particles with protective (and repellent) additives, creating a UV resistant effect. The product allows both machine and hand application, removing haze and oxidation while leaving a smooth, glossy finish. It is the world’s first maintenance product containing silica and designed from scratch to work at its best on all types of PPF, including modern self-healing films.

[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-quickdetailer.jpg?v=1702332115&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-qm-quick-detailer-400ml)

## Maintain with this
Use GYEON Quick Detailer to maintain your Paint & PPF. It can be used to remove light contaminants like bird droppings.

[
Shop GYEON Quick Detailer
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-qm-quick-detailer-400ml)
[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-ppf-wash-square.webp?v=1737224087&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-ppf-wash-400ml)

## PPF Wash
Washes and decontaminates PPF without the need for an abrasive clay bar.

[
Shop GYEON PPF Wash
](https://carzilla.ca/products/gyeon-ppf-wash-400ml)
[

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-tire.jpg?v=1702332115&width=1080)

](https://carzilla.ca/products/q2-tire-sio2-coating-400ml)

## Don't forget the tires
Dress the tires for a complete show car look. GYEON Tire provides a nice satin finish.

[
Shop GYEON Tire
](https://carzilla.ca/products/q2-tire-sio2-coating-400ml)

![image](//carzilla.ca/cdn/shop/files/gyeon-wax-glossy-results_1.jpg?v=1702326442&width=2400)

PRO TIPS
An all-in-one product for maintenance and sealing of glossy PPF. Once used by hand, Q²M PPF Renew will provide excellent cleaning abilities with a protective result. Machine use is recommended with an eccentric machine on minimum to medium revs and will add fantastic gloss to the end result. TIP: Never overheat the PPF while polishing. We highly recommend the use of our Q²M Eccentric Polish pad with a suitable machine. Apply a layer of Q² CanCoat to increase hydrophobicity.

Description

![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/gyeon-compound-banner-carzilla_1500x400.jpg?v=1635902609)

# GYEON PPF Renew

## Advanced quartz technology combined with user friendly characteristics

[![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/download-gyeon-brochure_480x480.jpg?v=1666391207)](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0013/8903/5555/files/GYEON__09_Leaflet_PPF_Maintenace_2022_WEB.pdf?v=1666391020)

Maintaining paint protection film has never been that easy. Q²M PPF Renew combines light abrasive particles with protective (and repellent) additives, creating resistant and highly self cleaning finish. The product allows both machine and hand application, removing haze and oxidation while leaving a smooth, glossy and repellent finish. It is the world’s first maintenance product containing silica and designed from scratch to work at its best on all types of PPF, including modern self healing films.

### BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

An all-in-one product for maintenance and sealing of glossy PPF. Once used by hand, Q²M PPF Renew will provide excellent cleaning abilities with a protective result. Machine use is recommended with an eccentric machine on minimum to medium revs and will add fantastic gloss to the end result. TIP: Never overheat the PPF while polishing. We highly recommend the use of our Q²M Eccentric Polish pad with a suitable machine.

CONSUMPTION: 60ml/ car

DURABILITY: up to 8 months

BEADING: ★★★★★

SELF-CLEANING: ★★★★★

### SiO2 INFUSED PPF MAINTENANCE

Q²M PPF Renew is the world’s first SiO² infused paint protection film maintenance product. Containing silica, not only does it restore gloss and slickness, it also does provide great repellency combined with UV and chemical resistance.

### SLICK & GLOSSY

Even high quality, self healing paint protection film becomes contaminated, dull and changes its initial smoothness over time. Gyeon Q²M PPF Renew brings a remedy to that. With its light abrasive properties, it is able to dramatically improve the level of gloss. The cleaning action of the product allows the removal of bonded contamination deep in the porous structure, restoring the initial slickness and smooth feel of the film.

Can I apply PPF Renew by hand?

Yes, you can apply and polish GYEON PPF Renew by hand to remove light defects such as etched bug guts and water spots. However, a polisher will be required to remove swirl marks.

PPF Renew can be used to recover lost slickness and beading?

Yes, PPF Renew can be used to restore lost slickness and hydrophobicity. However, it is an "all-in-one" product and will not perform as effectively as dedicated PPF maintenance products, such as GYEON PPF Coating or PPF Maintain, when it comes to hydrophobic properties.

Does it offer UV protection?

Yes, GYEON PPF Renew provides UV protection. UV blockers are essential to prevent the film (or the adhesive that secures the film to the paint) from turning yellow.

The all-in-one properties sound great, can I use this on paint as well?

You can, but only for very fine jeweling purposes. The main difference between a PPF polish and a paint polish is that PPF polishes are much gentler and contain more lubricating liquids. This helps the polishing pad glide more easily on the grabby surface of PPF during the polishing stage.

Anything else I need to know?

Check out the video [here](https://youtu.be/C-NvIYb8sNo?si=izJV_v_vYTOPIRhd) to see it in action.
